[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10100100 3
1 01111111 7
2 01110110 5
3 01011010 4
4 11110010 5
5 11111111 a
6 10111101 6
7 10001111 5
